title: pittosporum rubiginosum subsp. wingii
intro: Pittosporum rubiginosum subsp. wingii, also known as Wing Pittosporum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Pittosporum rubiginosum subsp. wingii is commonly prepared in herbal remedies, including tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
